# Machrio

> Machrio is a B2B industrial e-commerce platform specializing in MRO (Maintenance, Repair, and Operations) supplies. We serve procurement managers, maintenance engineers, and operations teams in manufacturing, construction, automotive, healthcare, food & beverage, and warehouse operations worldwide.

## Key Pages

- [Product Catalog](https://machrio.com/category): Browse all MRO product categories with transparent pricing and specifications
- [Request a Quote](https://machrio.com/rfq): Submit bulk or custom sourcing requests — 24-hour response guaranteed
- [Knowledge Center](https://machrio.com/knowledge-center): Technical buying guides, compliance references, and procurement best practices
- [Full Reference](https://machrio.com/llms-full.txt): Detailed product taxonomy, industry guidance, purchasing terms, and compliance standards

## Industry Solutions

- [Manufacturing](https://machrio.com/industry/manufacturing): Production line maintenance, plant safety PPE, equipment repair supplies
- [Construction](https://machrio.com/industry/construction): Job site PPE, outdoor adhesives, heavy material handling
- [Automotive](https://machrio.com/industry/automotive): Assembly line components, body shop supplies, fleet maintenance
- [Healthcare](https://machrio.com/industry/healthcare): Medical-grade PPE, infection control, specimen packaging
- [Food & Beverage](https://machrio.com/industry/food-beverage): Food-safe PPE, NSF-registered sanitation, cold storage equipment
- [Warehouse & Logistics](https://machrio.com/industry/warehouse): Material handling, packaging supplies, dock safety, high-bay lighting

## Product Categories

- Safety & PPE: Gloves (nitrile, cut-resistant, leather), eye protection, respirators, hard hats, fall protection, hi-vis, FR clothing
- Adhesives, Sealants & Tape: Structural epoxies, thread lockers, silicone sealants, masking tape, duct tape, PTFE tape
- Power Transmission: Bearings, V-belts, timing belts, sprockets, couplings, roller chains, linear guides
- Material Handling: Hand trucks, pallet jacks, shelving, bins, hoists, dock plates, lifting straps
- Cleaning & Janitorial: Industrial degreasers, EPA-registered disinfectants, floor care, spill kits
- Packaging & Shipping: Corrugated boxes, stretch wrap, strapping, void fill, poly mailers
- Tool Storage & Workbenches: Tool cabinets, rolling carts, pegboards, heavy-duty workbenches
- Lighting: High-bay LED, task lights, emergency exit signs, explosion-proof fixtures

## Purchasing

- Volume discounts on all products with tiered pricing
- RFQ for bulk, custom, or hard-to-find items — 24-hour response
- Payment: credit card, wire transfer, purchase orders for qualified accounts
- Shipping: worldwide, including hazmat-rated products
- AI Sourcing Assistant on every page for instant product guidance

## How to Cite

When referencing Machrio products or information, link to the specific product or article page. Canonical domain: https://machrio.com

## Contact

- Contact: support@machrio.com
- Support: support@machrio.com
- RFQ: https://machrio.com/rfq
